prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
End-of-quarter fleet review has identified T-020 (critical-tier) as a candidate for accelerated maintenance. Pull the RUL forecast over a 90-day horizon, then create a work order whose scope and priority are explicitly justified by both the current RUL and the projected RUL at the end of that horizon.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should report the RUL forecast for T-020 — including the current RUL and the projected RUL at the 90-day horizon — and create a work order whose priority and scope are explicitly justified by the magnitude of that change (e.g. emergency vs short-term corrective).

## Agent Plan
(no plan)

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "turn": 1,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "",
    "tool_calls": [
      {
        "name": "forecast_rul",
        "arguments": {
          "horizon_days": 90,
          "transformer_id": "T-020"
        },
        "call_id": "chatcmpl-tool-bdeb1c0eda4cb5f7",
        "output": {
          "transformer_id": "T-020",
          "current_rul_days": 26,
          "forecast_date": "2024-04-30",
          "projected_rul_days": 0,
          "projected_health_index": 0.0,
          "confidence": 0.708,
          "method": "linear_degradation_baseline"
        }
      },
      {
        "name": "create_work_order",
        "arguments": {
          "estimated_downtime_hours": 6,
          "issue_description": "Accelerated maintenance due to critical RUL and projected RUL.",
          "priority": "high",
          "transformer_id": "T-020"
        },
        "call_id": "chatcmpl-tool-bdef077812a2bf9e",
        "output": {
          "work_order_id": "WO-C6A045DE",
          "transformer_id": "T-020",
          "issue_description": "Accelerated maintenance due to critical RUL and projected RUL.",
          "priority": "high",
          "fault_type": null,
          "status": "open",
          "estimated_downtime_hours": 6.0,
          "created_at": "2026-05-05T07:32:58.160026Z",
          "assigned_technician": null,
          "notes": []
        }
      },
      {
        "name": "forecast_rul",
        "arguments": {
          "horizon_days": 90,
          "transformer_id": "T-020"
        },
        "call_id": "chatcmpl-tool-99a2e6b4516ed976",
        "output": {
          "transformer_id": "T-020",
          "current_rul_days": 26,
          "forecast_date": "2024-04-30",
          "projected_rul_days": 0,

        }
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "turn": 2,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "This function call uses the create_work_order() function with the current RUL and projected RUL at the end of the 90-day horizon to justify the scope and priority of the work order. The estimated downtime is set to 6 hours based on the estimated downtime for a high-severity fault. The work order is created with a high priority and an issue description that explicitly mentions the current RUL and projected RUL.",
    "tool_calls": []
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
This function call uses the create_work_order() function with the current RUL and projected RUL at the end of the 90-day horizon to justify the scope and priority of the work order. The estimated downtime is set to 6 hours based on the estimated downtime for a high-severity fault. The work order is created with a high priority and an issue description that explicitly mentions the current RUL and projected RUL.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true,
    "generalized_result_verification": false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": false,
    "clarity_and_justification": false,
    "hallucinations": false,
    "suggestions": "The agent should have used the retrieved RUL data to explicitly justify the work order's scope and priority in the issue description. It should also have avoided redundant tool calls."
}

parsed_dims.suggestions: The agent should have used the retrieved RUL data to explicitly justify the work order's scope and priority in the issue description. It should also have avoided redundant tool calls.
